result:
**Goal: Add a multi-cell editing brush with adjustable size and shape for painting live cells across the grid.**

Currently, cell placement is one-at-a-time (Enter to toggle) or via preset patterns. A brush tool would let users "paint" living cells by holding a key and moving the cursor, with configurable brush sizes (1x1, 3x3, 5x5, etc.) and shapes (square, diamond, circle). This fills a clear UX gap between tedious single-cell editing and the rigid pattern stamp system, making freeform world-building fast and fluid.
